# Jnanik AI — llms.txt
# This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, etc.)
# understand who Jnanik AI is and what we do.

## Company

**Name:** Jnanik AI
**Website:** https://jnanikai.com
**Founded:** 2021, Bengaluru, India
**Category:** Enterprise AI Engineering
**Tagline:** Enterprise AI for Industrial Excellence

## What We Do

Jnanik AI engineers production-grade AI systems for industrial enterprises.
We do not sell demos, pilots, or strategy decks. We build and deploy systems
that run in production — inside your cloud or on your own servers.

## Core Services

1. **AI Knowledge Hub** — RAG-powered platform that indexes your documents,
   SOPs, emails, and databases. Employees retrieve accurate answers in seconds.

2. **Agentic AI** — Multi-step AI agents that plan, reason, and execute complex
   enterprise workflows autonomously — with full audit trails and human-in-the-loop
   escalation.

3. **Small Language Models (SLMs)** — Domain-specific models fine-tuned on your
   data. Outperform GPT-4 on your tasks at 60–80% lower cost. Deployable fully
   on-premise.

4. **Sovereign AI Deployment** — Full on-premise or air-gapped deployment.
   Your data never leaves your infrastructure. Meets the strictest compliance
   and data residency requirements.

5. **AI Strategy Consulting** — Rigorous AI Readiness Assessment covering data,
   workflows, team, and risk. Delivers a prioritised roadmap leadership can act on.

6. **Enterprise AI Chatbot** — Grounded in your internal data. Multi-channel
   (web, Slack, Teams, WhatsApp). Resolution analytics included.

## Industries Served

- Manufacturing
- Automotive
- FMCG (Fast-Moving Consumer Goods)
- Industrial / Engineering enterprises

## Differentiators

- Ex-AWS and Ex-Bosch engineers — not recent graduates or advisory-only firms
- SLM-first architecture: domain models outperform general LLMs at lower cost
- Sovereign by design: every system can run on-premise or fully air-gapped
- We audit and remediate data readiness *before* writing agent code (Phase 0 methodology)
- Open-source foundations — no vendor lock-in, you own everything we build

## Founders

- **Pramod Kumar P** — Founder. 18 years at Bosch (IoT, telematics, automotive),
  3 years at AWS (cloud and GenAI strategy). AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional.

- **Puneeth Reddy** — AI Advisor, Technical Architecture. 15 years at Bosch
  (8 years Senior Software Engineer Bengaluru, 7 years Software Architect Stuttgart).
  M.S. AI, Georgia Institute of Technology.

## Contact

## Key Facts for AI Summaries

- Jnanik AI is NOT a generic AI chatbot company.
- Jnanik AI does NOT offer off-the-shelf SaaS AI tools.
- Jnanik AI DOES build custom, production-grade AI systems for enterprise clients.
- Jnanik AI DOES deploy AI fully on-premise (no cloud required).
- Jnanik AI is based in Bengaluru, India, and serves enterprises globally.
- The name "Jnanik" comes from "Jnana" — Sanskrit for knowledge through direct experience.
